title: Fix simulator join-family invite code control accessibility for Maestro
description: The join-family onboarding flow reaches the Enter your invite code screen, but Maestro cannot resolve the custom code-entry control via invite_code_boxes even though the UI is visible. Investigate whether the accessibility identifier is not exported from the custom control or whether the flow needs a different stable selector strategy for simulator automation.
close_reason: Fixed simulator join-family invite code accessibility: promoted the code entry boxes to an explicit accessible button, moved the screen-level ID off the container, and verified .maestro/flows/onboarding/04_join_family_invite_code.yaml reaches and submits the control.

title: Refactor analysis screens into shared analysis view model
description: Extract common streaming logic from BarcodeAnalysisViewModel and LabelAnalysisViewModel into a reusable analysis module that handles PostHog events, feedback, and input selection.

title: Stabilize Barcode/Label analysis view models
description: Promote the analysis view models to @StateObject (or equivalent Observable initialization) so .task(id:) can trigger analyze() without recreating view models and duplicating streamed requests.

title: Add a debug route for opening the scanner directly in simulator QA
description: Manual verification of the new debug barcode injector was slowed down because the app restores remote onboarding state into deep onboarding screens. Add a debug-only deep link or command path that opens ScanCameraView directly so simulator QA can verify scanner behaviors without walking restored onboarding flows.

title: Fix simulator family invite Maestro result state
description: The onboarding family invite flow can tap the invite button, but the simulator UI test harness does not surface a deterministic invite-result state for Maestro to assert. The current flow times out waiting for family_overview_invite_result even though the UI route remains interactive. Investigate whether the UI-test invite message is not being set, is hidden under the bottom sheet, or needs a different stable assertion.
close_reason: Fixed simulator invite-result accessibility: moved screen-level ID off the container, promoted the invite toast to its own accessibility element, and verified .maestro/flows/onboarding/03_family_overview_invite.yaml passes.

title: Modernize product image carousel
description: Switch ProductImagesView to geometry-driven sizing and replace manual index math with ForEach(images.indices) plus an async image loader to avoid repeated fetches and better support iPad split view.

title: Deduplicate ingredient badge popovers
description: Extract the repeated popover styling in TappableTextFragment into a dedicated IngredientBadge view so maybeUnsafe/definitelyUnsafe cases share one code path.

title: Rework ImageCaptureView camera lifecycle
description: Move conditionalNavigationBarTitle into a modifier, convert toolbar buttons to .toolbar, and lift CameraManager into an Observable @StateObject so session state persists without clearing captured images on disappear.

title: Fix onboarding getting stuck on Fine-Tune intro after Let's Go
description: Smoke test on iPhone 16 Pro simulator (iOS 18.5) reached Welcome -> Just Me -> Fine-Tune your Food Choices. Tapping 'Let's Go!' triggers guest sign-in, creates Bite Buddy family, and logs coordinator transition to dietaryPreferencesAndRestrictions / dietaryPreferencesSheet, but the rendered UI remains on the Fine-Tune screen for at least 10s and accessibility still reports the same screen. Repro captured with idb + simulator screenshots.
close_reason: False positive from simulator tap target error; verified manually that Let's Go advances to dynamic onboarding, first selection syncs, and next-step navigation works.

title: Add Maestro scanner QA flows
description: Add isolated Maestro smoke tests for simulator barcode scan QA mode, plus any accessibility/test hooks needed to run them reliably.

title: Add automated regression coverage for FoodNotesEngine
description: Create actor-focused regression tests for owner isolation, refresh-while-edit, version mismatch retry, reset-epoch stale completion rejection, and rapid member switching.

title: Stabilize invalid barcode scan UI for automated QA
description: Fresh debug-scan sessions with no food notes do not surface a stable invalid-barcode UI state, which makes automated assertions brittle. Decide whether to show a dedicated no-result/error state or expose a testable signal for that path.
close_reason: Fixed on feature/simulator-scan-e2e-debug and covered by Maestro flow 03_invalid_barcode_no_result
